description:
About the role
We are looking for a Junior AI Engineer to build, deploy, and maintain production‑ready automation for customer support and internal workflows. You will work under a senior engineer to improve chatbot accuracy, optimise ticket classification, and set up reliable deployment pipelines. This is an implementation‑focused role for someone with at least 1 year of relevant experience (internships count).
Key Responsibilities
Improve RAG chatbot performance
– Reduce hallucination, increase retrieval relevance, and lower response latency for the existing FAQ chatbot.
Build CI/CD for model deployment
– Containerise AI services with Docker and set up automated testing & deployment pipelines (GitHub Actions + cloud).
Optimise ticket classifier for production
– Refactor the intern‑built classifier to handle higher throughput and integrate with internal ticketing systems via API.
Create monitoring and alerting
– Implement basic dashboards for model accuracy, API uptime, and error rates (e.g., Prometheus + Grafana or cloud logs).
Collaborate on new automation features
– Work with senior engineers to add workflow automation for payment processing and internal request handling (no gambling terms).
Document and hand over
– Maintain clear technical documentation, runbooks, and versioned model artifacts.
Requirements
1+ year of relevant experience
– Internships, freelance, or full‑time roles in AI/ML engineering, data science, or backend automation.
Production Python skills
– Able to write maintainable code, use FastAPI/Flask, and containerise with Docker.
LLM & RAG in production
– Have deployed or significantly contributed to a RAG‑based system (LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar) in a real or simulated production environment.
Version control & CI/CD
– Proficient with Git (branching, PRs) and at least one CI/CD tool (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins).
Cloud basics
– Experience with one cloud provider (AWS, GCP, or Azure) for deploying APIs or scheduled jobs.
